source_description: The scene begins outside a brick apartment building on a snowy day as a yellow taxi drives past. The setting changes to an apartment interior where Monica and Rachel sit at a round table decorating cookies. Ross sits on a sofa in the background, holding an object. By the window, Phoebe turns toward the room.
